"[23] HE AND SEVERAL OTHER MOTORCYCLISTS WOULD LIKE TO DRIVE AROUND THE CLOSURE"
"[22] CALL TRANSFERED IN - CALLER ADVISES THERE IS APPOX 2 1/2 MILES OF VEHS BACKED UP"
"[19] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 TOW MEDIC 909-856-4165 W/FB FOR MC [Shared]"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1126-Disabled Veh Occupied to 1125-Traffic Hazard by CHP [Shared]"
"[1] VV - SIL ACURA SD , ON RS "
